title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at Paytm Money

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at Paytm Money
jsonLd.description:
We at Paytm Money are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Jodhpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Paytm Money:
Paytm Money is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm Money!
